import React from'react'; import Link from'next/link'; import type { BlogPost } from'../data/blogPosts'; interface BlogLayoutProps { post: BlogPost; children?: React.ReactNode; } const BlogLayout: React.FC = ({ post, children }) => { return (
Back to Blog

{post.title}

{post.author.charAt(0)}

{post.author}

Author

{post.date}

Published

{post.readTime}

Reading time

{post.description}

{children || ( <> {post.content.split('.').map((sentence, idx) => (

{sentence}{sentence.endsWith('.') ?'':'.'}

))} )}

Start billing like a pro today

Ready to create your own professional invoices and get paid faster? Try our free invoice builder.

Create My First Invoice
); }; export default BlogLayout;
